notes.en: This ranking assumes [[character:xiangling]] is run with [[character:bennett]] and a buffer.

Weapons and artifacts with Elemental Mastery, such as [[weapon:dragons-bane]], [[weapon:kitain-cross-spear]], and EM substats, gain value in team comps where [[character:xiangling]] can trigger both [[element:vaporize]] and [[element:overload]] at the same time, such as Raiden National.
